race.comment: ASTRO WORLD (11) bolted in fresh before being left with too much to do last time out at Northam in the WA Day Cup. Drawn wide again here, so expect him to be back in the run and launching a strong attack late. ANTIQUE QUEEN (9) sat closer and was too good over this track and trip last start when on the quick turnaround. Chris Parnham sticks with her today and she was quickly back to her best form this campaign. Can continue to move through the grades. HEY PINO (7) missed narrowly over 1400m last start and should appreciate getting out to the mile now. Hitting his peak and this looks to set up favourably for him on the quick turnaround. MISSISSIPPI DAWN (12) is third-up now and can bounce back to winning form with the form out of her last start working out well. SIMPLY THINKIN' (3) gets CJP back on board today after closing well in the WA Day Cup. Include.
